title: 4 Stocks to Hold in a Challenging Outpatient Home Health Industry
text: Despite the macroeconomic challenges, dependence on telehealth and AI dominance are likely to drive the Zacks Medical - Outpatient and Home Healthcare industry. DVA, CHE, AMED and ADUS are well poised to gain.
